sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111285" key="filolouste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-λουστέον</orth>, <sense id="n111285.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must be too fond of bathing,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οὐ φ.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.50</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
